payload:
# Office of Accountability — Implementation Prompt

## Objective

Build a civic knowledge platform for Argentine politics as an interactive graph explorer. The platform links politicians, votes, legislation, donors, promises, and user-contributed research into a single explorable, queryable system powered by Neo4j and deployed on Cloudflare Workers via Vinext.

## Stack

- **Frontend + API + SSR:** Vinext (App Router, Server Components, Route Handlers) → Cloudflare Workers
- **Database:** Ne... [truncated, 6452 chars total]
Created src/lib/investigations/types.ts + utils.ts — M9 foundation types committed (268ab54)
Verified and closed m9:utils task — utils.ts already committed in 268ab54, typecheck passes. Ready for Phase 1 scripts.
Created seed-investigation-configs.ts (57c1da2). 3 InvestigationConfig subgraphs seeded and verified. Next: init-schema.ts generic label constraints.
Added generic label constraints + caso_slug range indexes to schema.ts (3f76867). Phase 1 complete. Next: Phase 2 migrate-caso-libra-labels.ts

Created migrate-caso-libra-labels.ts (9599706). Two-phase migration: Phase 1 creates generic nodes with caso_slug + prefixed IDs, Phase 2 deletes old CasoLibra* nodes. Next: update seed-caso-libra.ts to use generic labels

Updated seed-caso-libra.ts to generic labels (d12e02a). All CasoLibra* labels replaced with Person/Organization/Token/Event/Document/Wallet + caso_slug. Phase 2 complete. Next: seed-caso-finanzas-politicas.ts (Phase 3)

Created seed-caso-finanzas-politicas.ts (e3d1e53). 63 nodes (21 persons, 18 orgs, 9 events, 7 money flows, 8 claims) + 52 relationships. Phase 3 complete. Next: seed-caso-epstein.ts alignment (Phase 4)

Updated seed-caso-epstein.ts (dc9d7f6). All 290 IDs prefixed with caso-epstein:, caso_slug filters on all MATCH clauses, session pattern. Phase 4 complete. Next: Phase 5 (query-builder, registry, API routes)
Created investigations/config.ts (ad73035). Reads InvestigationConfig + schema subgraphs from Neo4j. Phase 5 in progress. Next: query-builder.ts

Created investigations/query-builder.ts (6092318). Schema-aware generic query builder implementing InvestigationQueryBuilder interface. Two-pass graph queries, label sanitization, pagination. Phase 5 in progress. Next: per-caso-configs
